chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3117 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.4 2. For order on CMA No.13277/2020 (Exemption) 3. For order on CMA No.13278/2020 (Stay) 4. For order on CMA No.13279/2020 (Inspection) 5. For hearing of main case 05.11.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2020, which is over five years ago. It was last taken up on 25.10.2021, which is over four years ago, when none was present for the petitioner without intimation and the petition was adjourned as an indulgence for one week and order for compliance was made. Learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently in the last over four years. Once again, today, none present for the petitioner without intimation despite lapse of four years. The petitioner has never appeared in this petition. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
